name: @xubylele/jinja2-enhanced-shared
description: Shared pure utilities used by the Jinja2 Enhance free and Pro VS Code extensions.
author: Xubylele

scripts.prepare: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.changeset:check: node -e "const f=require('fs').readdirSync('.changeset').filter(n=>n.endsWith('.md')&&n!=='README.md');if(!f.length){process.stderr.write('No changeset found. Run: npm run changeset\n');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('Changesets found:',f.join(', '))}"
